data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. SAILPLANE struggled in tougher grade last start at this track, but prior to that won by a long neck at this track (19.65) beating Tropic Man in a Grade 5 on April 3. Solid formlines coming through his last run. Has ability and can bounce back. 1. SPECIAL SIAN wasn't far away at the finish when 4th and beaten only 4.5 lengths (19.70) at this track. Form here at the trip sound including eight wins. Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings eight times from 14 starts. Can do much better this time. 7. CRUELLA broke from the inside draw and filled a minor placing last start, beaten only 1.5 lengths (19.52) behind Ring A Houdini at this track. Solid formlines coming through her last run. Expected to be in the finish again. 2. HAPPY BUDDHA is right in the mix.","runners":[5,1,7,2],"exclusive":false}
